evidence.content: A video post by @JesterJum of 'soup' elicited comments questioning its authenticity as 'AI created'.
An image of Earth posted by @forallcurious received comments speculating it was 'AI created'.
A comment on @elonmusk's post about Grok AI articulated that 'AI doesn't need to destroy the truth. It just needs to make us doubt it'.
@elonmusk announced 'Grok Imagine Pro mode for 1080P images & video later this month', highlighting advancements in AI content generation.
@elonmusk claimed that 'Grok video games are going to be incredible', indicating anticipated advancements in AI-driven entertainment.
@ProudSocialist alleged a 'double tap' strike in the Iran bombing, where 'the second strike occurred while emergency responders were assisting the wounded'.
@ProudSocialist's claim of a 'double tap' strike in Iran with targeting of rescue workers implicitly challenges international norms of warfare.
@narendramodi met with Denis Manturov, First Deputy Chairman of the Government of Russia, to discuss mutual cooperation in trade and other areas.
@Microinteracti1 highlighted a post by the US President containing a '150-word personal attack on Bruce Springsteen', rather than addressing substantive issues.
@astrooalert shared a 'BREAKING' post about an astronaut capturing a 'Rare Luminous Phenomenon from Earth Orbit', showcasing scientific observation.
@NASA provided an update on 'Flight Day 2 for the @NASAArtemis II mission', detailing crew activities and mission progress.
